onboarding.title: Welcome to Curatarr!
onboarding.subtitle: Your library is empty. To get started:
onboarding.step1Suffix: and set your Library Root Folders (Movies).
onboarding.step2Suffix: to analyse your files with ffprobe.

stats.moviesHint: Curatarr treats one library folder as one movie record. If multiple versions exist in a folder, they appear under that movie as Files (2), Files (3), etc.
stats.scannedFilesHint: File-level ffprobe scan coverage. This is per video file, not per movie folder.
stats.jellyfinSyncedHint: Movie-level status. Curatarr maps one folder to one movie; multi-version files stay inside that movie record and are shown in Movie details as Files (2), Files (3), etc.
stats.scanErrorsHint: Basic file sanity/metadata scan failures from ffprobe during library scan. This is separate from Disambiguate and Deep Verify errors.
